MAPTILER: Create a MapTiler account, open Account > API keys, then copy a key with Maps access.
MapTiler Satellite uses this key in the Static Maps API.
MAPBOX: Create a Mapbox account, open Tokens, then copy a public access token with Styles/Static Images access.
The default public token is usually enough for Mapbox Satellite static imagery.
GOOGLE: Create or open a Google Cloud project, enable Maps Static API, then create an API key.
Restrict the key to the Maps Static API and your allowed environments when possible.
SENTINEL_HUB: Create a Sentinel Hub account and OAuth client, then provide a valid access token.
This addon also needs account-specific endpoint configuration before Sentinel Hub can be used as a basemap.
PLANET: Create a Planet account, open Account settings, then copy your API key.
Planet requires account-specific imagery endpoint configuration before it can be used as a basemap.
MAXAR: Use your Maxar developer or enterprise portal to generate an access token.
Maxar requires account-specific imagery endpoint configuration before it can be used as a basemap.
AIRBUS: Use your Airbus OneAtlas account or enterprise portal to generate an API token.
Airbus requires account-specific imagery endpoint configuration before it can be used as a basemap.
